# Source Inventory

<!-- Framework default template. The ## headings below are the required
     sections the required-sections sensor checks. A team override at
     aidlc/spaces/<space>/memory/templates/source-inventory.md wins. -->

## Supplied materials

One row per material the team handed over. What it is, what kind of thing it
is (document, dataset, codebase, recording, link), where it lives, and the
open questions it likely answers.

| Material | Kind | Where it lives | Questions it likely answers |
|----------|------|----------------|------------------------------|

## Suggested but not supplied

Materials the workflow asked for that never arrived — what was suggested, and
whether it was declined or is still pending. "None" is a valid entry.

## Gaps

What no supplied or pending material covers — recorded here rather than
guessed at.
